Hardware Component File

Clim J81 Série (vers07)

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference Clim_J81_Serie_(vers07).json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol KWP2000
Baudrate N/A
Send ID N/A
Receive ID N/A
Functional Addr 29
Functional Name Climatisation

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "17",
    "supplier": "189",
    "soft": "0011",
    "version": "0016"
  }
]
